title: Simulator: TDMA time model
description:
Add TDMA slot timing to simulator.

## Changes
1. Superframe clock in simulation time
2. Nodes track assigned slot, TX only in slot
3. Model beacon reception and sync
4. Model clock drift and guard time

## Validation
- Verify zero collisions when all nodes are synced
- Measure throughput vs ALOHA/CSMA at density
- Model sync loss and recovery
close_reason: Implemented TDMA superframe clock, slot tracking, beacon sync, drift/guard model in simulator; validated zero collisions and throughput; updated SimNode, Medium, Simulation, tests per spec and vectors
